Who I Am

Where Code
Meets Canvas

The intersection of deep learning and visual imagination — where data becomes art and algorithms become stories.

Cyberpunk Series · 2025

I'm a B.Tech CS student at IIIT Ranchi specialising in AI & Data Science — but my true medium is the intersection of deep learning and visual imagination. I think in frames, compose in prompts, and dream in render passes.

From engineering emotion-recognition systems to generating cinematic AI worlds, I believe the most powerful tool is a mind that refuses to separate science from art. Every pixel I generate is backed by the same rigour I apply to my research.

Currently seeking creative roles where imagination and technology collide — webtoons, comics, social creatives, branding, and beyond.

Technical Work

THE CODE
BENEATH

AI systems engineered with precision — each project a bridge between technical mastery and creative application.

01 · COMPUTER VISION

Emotion Recognition GUI

Real-time facial emotion classification at 24+ FPS using a modular CNN backbone. Directly applicable to character expression mapping and animation reference workflows in AI art.

PythonCNNOpenCV24+ FPS
02 · IDENTITY AI

Face Recognition Attendance

97% recognition accuracy using 128-dimensional face embeddings — demonstrating deep understanding of how AI models perceive and remember visual identity.

CNNKNN97% AccuracyPython
03 · SPATIAL TRACKING

Eye Controlled Mouse

68-point facial mesh gaze-tracking tool — reflecting spatial reasoning and anatomical proportions essential for character design and expression work.

OpenCVMediaPipe68-pt Mesh
04 · NLP TOOLING

paper.py — Research Indexer

Custom Python tool indexing 50+ AI research papers for rapid synthesis — enabling lightning-fast adoption of cutting-edge visual AI techniques.

PythonNLPPandas50+ Papers
05 · RESEARCH · IIIT RANCHI

Medical Image Analysis — WCE Deep Learning

Benchmarked ResNet-50, VGG-16 and EfficientNet-B0 across 10,000+ Wireless Capsule Endoscopy frames for detection of polyps, bleeding and ulcers. Reduced false-positive rates by 15% through precision augmentation and threshold tuning — the same iterative craft that drives prompt refinement in AI art.

ResNet-50VGG-16 EfficientNet-B010k+ Frames −15% False PositivesOngoing
